title: Crispy Lamb Koftas
description: A classic Turkish-inspired dish featuring crispy lamb koftas, perfect for a quick dinner.

ingredients.name: Ground Lamb
ingredients.notes: Make sure to choose a good quality lamb for the best flavor

instructions: Preheat the grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
In a large bowl, mix together the ground lamb, onion, garlic, breadcrumbs, egg, salt, and black pepper.
Using your hands, shape the mixture into small koftas, about 1 1/2 inches in diameter.
Brush the koftas with a little bit of oil to prevent sticking.
Place the koftas on the grill and cook for 4-5 minutes per side, or until they are cooked through.
While the koftas are cooking, mix together the chopped parsley and a squeeze of lemon juice.
Once the koftas are done, place them on a plate and serve with the parsley mixture on top.
